zh.Gidea Hall, Essex, England: 英國艾可吉迪亞 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Cooke於1452年出生在英國艾可吉迪亞 霍爾時，他的父親Thomas Cooke30歲，母親Elizabeth Malpas26歲。他於1468年與Elizabeth Belknap結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年12月7日在英國艾可洛福德享年51歲，埋葬在英國艾可。

zh-hans.Gidea Hall, Essex, England: 英国艾可吉迪亞 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Cooke于1452年出生在英国艾可吉迪亞 霍爾时，他的父亲Thomas Cooke30岁，母亲Elizabeth Malpas26岁。他于1468年与Elizabeth Belknap结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1503年12月7日在英国艾可洛福德享年51岁，埋葬在英国艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Cooke was born in 1452, in Gidea Hall, Essex, England, his father, Thomas Cooke, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Malpas, was 26. He married Elizabeth Belknap in 1468. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 December 1503, in Romford, Essex, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Cooke est né en 1452, à Gidea Hall, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Cooke, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Malpas, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Belknap en 1468. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 décembre 1503, à Romford, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Cooke 1452 in Gidea Hall, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Cooke 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Malpas 26. Er hat 1468 Elizabeth Belknap geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Dezember 1503 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Romford, Essex, England und wurde in Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Cooke è nato il nel 1452 nel Gidea Hall, Essex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Cooke, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Malpas, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Belknap nel 1468. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 dicembre 1503, nel Romford, Essex, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Essex, England.

ja.Romford, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスロムフォード

ja.Gidea Hall, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスギディー ハル
ja.lifeSummary: Philip Cookeが1452年にイギリスエセックスギディー ハルで生まれた時，父Thomas Cookeは30歳，母Elizabeth Malpasは26歳であった。1468年にElizabeth Belknapと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1503年12月7日にイギリスエセックスロムフォードで51歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Cooke(이)가 1452년 영국 에세스 지디 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cooke(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Malpas(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1468년 Elizabeth Belknap(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 12월 7일 영국 에세스 롬퍼드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Cooke nasceu em 1452, em Gidea Hall, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Cooke, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Malpas, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Belknap em 1468. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1503, em Romford, Essex, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Cooke родился в 1452 г. в местности гидеа холл, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Cooke было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Malpas, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Belknap в 1468 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 декабря 1503 г. в местности ромфорд, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Cooke nació en 1452, en Gidea Hall, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Cooke, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Malpas, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Belknap en 1468. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1503, en Romford, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Essex, Inglaterra.
